Dec 06, 2022
Question: What matters most when it comes to shop and office lighting: the luminaire or the light? We think this question practically answers itself: It's the light, of course.

KAIST Team Develops Surface-Lighting MicroLED Patch with Significant Melanogenesis Inhibition Effect
Dec 01, 2022
A KAIST research team led by Ph.d candidate Jae Hee Lee and Professor Keon Jae Lee from the Department of Materials Science and Engineering has developed a surface-lighting microLED patch for UV-induced melanogenesis inhibition.

Dec 02, 2022
Lumileds released 14 new 3V parts in its LUXEON 2835 Commercial portfolio that deliver higher flux and efficacy to enable rapid upgrading of existing solutions and design of new lighting solutions. The new parts are available in all standard CCTs ...

DLC: First Products Qualified Under New LUNA Technical Requirements
Jul 29, 2022
The DLC announced the first products added to its LUNA Qualified Products List (QPL) after being tested and determined to meet the new LUNA Version 1.0 Technical Requirements for outdoor LED luminaires.

LUXTECH Launches CCT Mixer: Tunable White Controller
Nov 15, 2022
CCT Mixer by LUXTECH is designed to make common LED driver SKUs more versatile by giving them tunable white capability. Tunable White drivers often create extra fixture complexity, costs, configuration/programming time, and often with long lead ...

Rectangular beam from new 940nm OSLON Black IR LEDs matches field of view of automotive cameras used for driver and cabin monitoring.

Oct 31, 2022
Silanna UV has announced new far UV-C and deep UV-C LEDs that take advantage of the company’s patented short period superlattice (SPSL) technology for industry-leading performance in the difficult-to-obtain 230 – 265 nm UV range – including the ...

New Photophyll™ Select LEDs - Fully Optimized for Horticulture
Nov 01, 2022
Photophyll Select is an advanced horticulture spectrum available on XLamp® XP-G3 LEDs and J Series® 2835 3V G Class LEDs. These are the first LEDs fully characterized with horticulture spectral metrics.

FEATURED
LUXEON XR-HL2X and XR-5050 HE Standard Modules Provide a Faster Path to Lighting Solutions
Utilizing two of Lumileds most popular and powerful LEDs, the company has released two new standard integrated modules, LUXEON XR-HL2X and LUXEON XR-5050 HE. Both offer lighting engineers a faster, simpler way to realize powerful, highly efficient lighting solutions. Standard optics are available for all the new boards, and both offer typical efficacy of 184 lumens per Watt. Read more »
